forbidden_characters.&: Always substitute with the literal word 'and' everywhere
forbidden_characters.%: Always explicitly escape as '\%' to prevent background compilation loops

syntax_constraints.bullet_styling: Standard itemize environments only. Omit non-standard decorative or special characters.

tone_and_voice.style: Warm, authentic, deeply human, grounded in engineering logic

forbidden_words.trajectory: Replace entirely with the word 'journey' when discussing career progression

tone_and_voice.buzzword_policy: Avoid robotic corporate jargon; prefer concise, metric-backed impact statements.
